verse_text: Jesus Cleanses a Leper And it happened when He was in a certain city, that behold, a man who was full of leprosy saw Jesus; and he fell on his face and implored Him, saying, 'Lord, if You are willing, You can make me clean.'

links.context: On the cleansing of the leper, see notes at [[MAT.8:1]]-4 and [[LUK.5:12]]-16.
